tracks.rawText: 4:18Neon One Dropv4.5-allReggae tech dub with a loping one-drop drum groove at 74 BPM, fat spring-reverb snare, deep sub-bass, and skanking offbeat guitar chops, Digital delay throws, tape echo feedback, filtered synth stabs, and glitchy percussion edits add futuristic pressure while cavernous dub space and saturated mix buss glue it togetherPublishRemix
tracks.title: Neon One Drop

tracks.rawText: 5:20Morning FIrev5.5Psychedelic rock with metal edge: dreamy analog synth pads, vinyl crackle, distant feedback, and slow-burning fuzz guitar leads, Hypnotic female vocals sit in lush reverb and delay, with soaring chorus layers, Thick bass, tom-heavy drums, phased arpeggios, and cosmic wah-soaked solos drive a mystical, heavy, expansive texture4PublishRemix
tracks.title: Morning FIre

tracks.rawText: 4:02La Mañanita IIv5.5Huapango poderoso y marcado con arpa huasteca, violín lead y jarana golpeada, plus guitarrón marcando el pulso en compás de 6/8, Folk Andino Mexa color with quena, charango, zampoña, bombo legüero, tight unison riffs, rasped string accents, and dry room ambience for a forceful, earthy, stomping groove11PublishRemix
